titleStmt.title: SII 25.210A: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 210A. (A.R. No. 210A of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: West base of the verandah in the first prākāra in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.

It refers to the order (ōlai) of Uḍaiyār Pallavarāyaṉ Vāṇarāyaṉ Śoḻiyavaraiya[ṉ*] and records the grant of his kāṇi lands at Nambankuṟuchchi as dēvadāna and tirunāmattukkāṇi-iṟaiyili for the food-offerings to the deity Pallavamādēvīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār enshrined in the western side of the circumambulatory path (tirunaḍai-māḷigai) in the temple of Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-ṉāyaṉār at Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉichchaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu in Rājēndra-śōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. Among the boundaries of the lands endowed is mentioned a brāhmaṇapaṟṟu named after an officer Rājagambhīra Śōḻiyavaraiyaṉ. This officer is identical with his namesake who is called Śokkanāyaṉ whose order making a gift of land to the ōduvar (reciters or eulogists) in the Tirukkai-kkōṭṭai of the temple. The record ends abgruptly and hence the details of the signatories of the order are not available.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Uṭaiyyār pallavarāyaṉ vāṇarāyaṉāṉa coḻiya varaiyaṉ Olai . Irācentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu Uccāttā
ṉamāṉa keraḷa kulācaniccaruppeti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruvu cāttāṉamuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyil tāṉattār kaṇ(ṭa)ṭu Innā
yaṉār koyil melaittirunaṭaiya māḷikaiyil Āśrayamāka Eḻuntaruḷivitta Uṭaiyār palla
māteviśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟkku tirupaṭimāṟṟukkum kaṟiyamutu Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉaṅkaḷukkum Ivvūr piṭākai nampan kuṟucciyil Eṉkāṇiyā
ṉa nilattu tevatāṉamum tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyiliyāka tanta nilamāvatu Aiñcā vāykkāl miykaṇṭattu viḷakkoḷi maṅkala muṭai
yar nilattukku teṟkku rūpāy (1/2)ṭi ø� kiḻakku mūṉṟumā �y nālā vāykkāl kiḻkaṇṭa Erikaraikku teṟkku kuḷḷiṭṭa rūpāy � kiḻakku mukkāl mūṉṟumā �m Itaṉ te
ṟkku taṭi pala viṭṭu teṟkku carakkai malaiyan payirc ceyta rūpāy 5� kiḻakku ç Ivvāykkāl kiḻkaṇṭattu pirāmaṇap paṟṟukku teṟkku caṇṭike
cura veḷān payircceyta rūpāy 5� kiḻakku (1/4)m Itan teṟkku taṭipala viṭṭu curaikkuṭaiyān coḻan payirc ceyta rūpāy 5gaø� kiśakku mukkāl Iraṇṭumām Ita
n teṟkku vākuṭaiyān coḻan payirc ceyta rūpāy 5gaø� kiśakku mukkāl Iraṇṭumām muṉṟām vāykkāl kiḻkaṇṭattu pirāmaṇapaṟṟukku teṟkku kiḻk kaṇṭa
�na kuḻivuṭaiyān rūpāy ma� 5mām Innilaṅkaḷukku nāṟṟuṅk kālāka viṭṭa Āṇṭānṉoṭaikku meṟkku Irāca kempira coḻiyavaraiyaṉ pirāma
ṇa paṟṟukku vaṭakku Uyyavantān kiṭaṅkan payirc ceyta rūpāy � kiśakku 5 rūpāy 5� kiśakku (1/4) Iraṇṭumā Innilam Aiñcumāviṟkiḻ Eḻu
Digital edition of SII 25.210A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
